examples: The present invention discloses an application of nakedflower beautyberry leaf extract in oral cleaning product.
Methods:230 patients were divided randomly into two groups:120 patients in treatment group treated by Beautyberry Pills and 110 patients in control group treated by Cephradine Capsules.
The nakedflower beautyberry extract is an extract which is extracted from nakedflower beautyberry leaves and contains a nakedflower beautyberry total flavonoid compound and a tannide class compound.
